exploration_notes: All five files were confirmed to exist at `security/nss/lib/ssl/` in the mozilla-firefox/firefox repository, both locally and via Sourcegraph. 1) `ssl3con.c` — implements SSL 3.0/TLS record processing, cipher suite negotiation, and the core handshake state machine (header: 'SSL3 Protocol'). 2) `tls13con.c` — implements TLS 1.3 handshake and record processing including key schedule, 0-RTT, and post-handshake messages (header: 'TLS 1.3 Protocol'). 3) `dtlscon.c` — implements DTLS-specific protocol
